title: leucanthemum eliasii
intro: Leucanthemum eliasii, also known as the Elias daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum eliasii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
